headline: How The Investment Story Is Shifting For Bank Pekao (WSE:PEO) As Analyst Views Diverge
summary: The latest fair value estimate for Bank Polska Kasa Opieki now stands at PLN 239.91, compared with the earlier PLN 233.62, while individual analyst price targets range from PLN 237 to PLN 265. This adjustment sits against a split analyst backdrop, where bullish teams highlight Central and Eastern Europe growth potential and cautious voices question how much optimism is already reflected in those targets. As you read on, you will see how these moving targets shape the evolving story around the...

headline: Gaming industry could unlock $22 billion in profits on AI-driven cost cuts, says Morgan Stanley
summary: Advanced artificial intelligence tools could help cut down video game developing costs by nearly half, potentially unlocking about $22 billion in annual ‌profits for game makers worldwide, Morgan Stanley analysts said. The adoption of AI tools ‌to automate tasks such as creating gaming environments, generating dialogue and testing software could help shorten production timelines and ​reduce costs, helping lift margins over time, the brokerage said in a note dated Tuesday. The Wall Street brokerage estimates global consumer spending on video games will total $275 billion this year, with roughly 20%, or ‌about $55 billion, set to be reinvested ⁠in game development and operations.

The Wall Street brokerage estimates global consumer spending on video games will total $275 billion this year, with roughly 20%, or ‌about $55 billion, set to be reinvested ⁠in game development and operations.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Morgan Stanley (MS) After A 76% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Morgan Stanley at around US$189 per share still offers value after a strong run, the key is to look past the headline price and into what the market is actually paying for its fundamentals. The stock has recent returns of 3.3% over 7 days, 17.2% over 30 days, 4.1% year to date and 76.1% over 1 year, so it is worth asking how much of that performance is already reflected in current expectations. headline: Morgan Stanley’s Strong Q1 Earnings And Capital Moves Could Be A Game Changer For Morgan Stanley (MS)
summary: In the first quarter of 2026, Morgan Stanley reported net income of US$5.57 billion, up from US$4.32 billion a year earlier, alongside higher basic and diluted earnings per share from continuing operations, while also confirming a quarterly dividend of US$1.00 per share and completing part of its ongoing share repurchase program. At the same time, the bank was active on the funding side, issuing US$2.50 billion in 4.555% notes due 2030 and US$3.25 billion in fixed-to-floating notes due 2032,...
